title: Feedback - send a Compliment feedback with names/email
scenario: Sending a compliment feedback with name and email from App Settings > Feedback fails to attach user details
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger or gear) to navigate to App Settings.
Scroll to and tap the Feedback section.
Select the 'Compliment' option from the feedback type choices.
Enter text in the feedback body field.
Enter the user's name in the Name field.
Enter the user's email address in the Email field.
Tap the Send button to submit the feedback.
expected: Feedback is successfully sent with the user's name and email attached to the submission.
